# Optional Skills (GitHub Agent Ecosystem)

This folder can hold reusable prompts/skills for agent-driven workflows.

Suggested naming:

- `.github/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md`

Suggested initial skills:

- `regression-guardian`: identify high-risk behavior changes.
- `test-suggester`: propose targeted pytest additions.
- `music-theory-auditor`: check key/mode/chord consistency.

> Note: different agent runtimes discover skills differently. Keep each skill self-contained and documented.
